description: A pair of left/right navigation buttons for cycling through a profile slider, with support for an inactive (disabled) state on either button.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Left button inactive (at start of slider), right button active

stories.name: RightInactive
stories.description: Right button inactive (at end of slider), left button active

stories.name: BothActive
stories.description: Both buttons active (in middle of slider)

notes: The inactive class disables the appearance of a slide button. In all observed samples the left button starts with inactive class. Icons use Font Awesome classes fas fa-angle-left and fas fa-angle-right.
